violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of wall in the food prep area and service counter. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The presence of flies and roaches are not controlled as evidenced by live activity and fecal matter. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of seeds, etc. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Wood is used in the construction of service counter and wall to food prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Employee informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
Entire kitchen, food and non-food contact surfaces are to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs, pork) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk, sauce) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Tamales were observed held at 77 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC informed that tamales must be held at 135 of above, see disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Tortillas, pork and desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. - Eggs were observed stored above tamales and sauce in reach-in refrigerator. - Pork was observed stored above tamales and milk in retail refrigerator. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Chicken and french fries were observed held at 71 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Tamales were observed being held on top of prep unit at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, tamales were made less than 2 hours prior. PIC moved to another refrigerator at time of inspection. PIC informed on proper storage in cold hold units. Watermelon was observed held on retail table at 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview with PIC, watermelon was just prepped. PIC moved to ice bath at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Pork and tortillas packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Drinks, sauce and flour were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Inspector observed desserts, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of rice. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Strawberries were observed adulterated with white and brown residue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

(Bleach) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects throughout retail area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
Inspector observed desserts, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Inspector observed desserts, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking soap and paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by an apron and bottle of spray cleanser. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
Inspector observed queso fresco from an unapproved source. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
Boxes of fruit and vegetables observed stored on inverted boxes on floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the front and rear of the establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Establishment does not have hot water. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Soap and paper towel was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Various items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the market, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by dead mouse in light shield. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Various vegetables were observed stored on the floor in the market. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Inspector observed desserts, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Refrigerator located in the market area was at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

Wood is used in the construction of handwash sink base in the 3 bay sink area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
At the time of inspection, no hot water was available. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
